channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Key Peace and Security Challenges Africa Must Address in 2026
item.description: Africa dey face plenty wahala for peace and security matter as 2026 don start. Big conflicts dey for Sudan, Sahel, Somalia, South Sudan, Cameroon, Ethiopia-Eritrea, and even the eastern DRC. For Sudan...

item.title: President Mwinyi Appreciates Reforms and Specialist Services at Benjamin Mkapa Hospital
item.description: The President of Zanzibar, Dr Hussein Ali Mwinyi, commended Benjamin Mkapa Hospital in Dodoma for its significant reforms and achievements in providing specialized medical services to the public. Duri...

item.title: Inquiry hears Valdo Calocane assaulted a police officer during mental health detention two years before Nottingham killings
item.description: A public inquiry into the 2023 Nottingham attacks has heard that Valdo Calocane assaulted a police officer nearly two years before carrying out the fatal stabbings that killed three people. Calocane, ...

item.title: Fresh Militia Clashes Raise Tensions on Kenya-Ethiopia Border
item.description: Tension remains high along the Kenya-Ethiopia border, particularly in Todonyang and Kokuro areas, following recent attacks by suspected Dassanech militia. On Friday morning, a 26-year-old herdsman, Ep...

item.title: Israel conducts air strike on Hezbollah positions in Beirut amid ongoing Iran-Israel-US tensions
item.description: Early on Thursday, March 5, 2026, an Israeli air strike targeted Hezbollah positions in the southern suburbs of Beirut, Lebanon, known as Dahiyeh. The strike followed prior warnings issued by Israel t...

item.title: LTFRB advises public not to transact with groups falsely claiming to represent officials
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has issued a public advisory cautioning the Filipino public against dealing with persons or groups who are illegally using the names of...

item.title: Shabana Mahmood outlines immigration reforms as Labour faces political challenges
item.description: With the next general election three years away, immigration has emerged as a central and highly divisive political issue in the United Kingdom. Sky News reports that Shabana Mahmood, the Home Secreta...

item.title: South African comedian and actor Soli Philander passes away at 65
item.description: Renowned South African comedian, actor, storyteller, and presenter Soli Philander has passed away at the age of 65. The sad news was confirmed late on Wednesday by Sport, Arts and Culture Minister Gay...

item.title: Wars strain the UK-US special relationship: Starmer defends cooperation amid tensions with Trump over Iran
item.description: The article examines the challenges facing Sir Keir Starmer in preserving the UK-US 'special relationship' during a period of heightened tension, particularly as the United States engages in military ...

item.title: Formula One 2026 Season Preview: Cars, Drivers and Team Prospects
item.description: The 2026 Formula One season promises intense competition across both established teams and newcomers. McLaren, reigning champions, may start slightly behind but are expected to leverage their strong d...

item.title: White House Prioritizes Price Stability Amid Iran Conflict, Per Leavitt
item.description: In the midst of escalating tensions in the Iran-US-Israel conflict, White House spokesperson Karoline Leavitt emphasized the administration's commitment to maintaining price stability for American con...

item.title: Ethiopia and Kenya to Strengthen Border Security Through Joint Military Operations
item.description: Ethiopia and Kenya have agreed to boost security along the Moyale-Marsabit-Turkana corridor through structured joint military operations. This is part of efforts to implement the Defence Cooperation A...

item.title: Halifax Transit Core Service Plan Approved in City Budget
item.description: Halifax City Council has approved the continuation of Halifax Transit’s Core Service Plan as part of the 2026 municipal budget. The plan, which aims to enhance the reliability and efficiency of public...

item.title: Second Suspect Arrested in Connection with Snowball Incident Injuring NYPD Officers in Washington Square Park
item.description: In late February 2026, a large organized snowball fight took place in New York City's Washington Square Park amid a major blizzard, promoted via social media. When NYPD officers arrived to manage the ...

item.title: SANDF to support SAPS in targeted operations against gangs and illegal mining
item.description: Acting Police Minister Firoz Cachalia has clarified that the deployment of the South African National Defence Force (SANDF) is not a quick fix for the country's crime challenges. Addressing a joint me...

item.title: OpenAI to allow Canadian experts to review safety protocols after Tumbler Ridge tragedy
item.description: Following the mass shooting in Tumbler Ridge, B.C., Canada's Artificial Intelligence Minister, Evan Solomon, held a virtual meeting with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman to address safety concerns around ChatGPT...

item.title: Study Shows Bungoma Youth Lack Awareness on Climate Justice
item.description: A recent study by the Youth Initiative for Land in Africa (YILAA), supported by the Youth Climate Justice Fund, reveals that the majority of young people in Bungoma County have limited knowledge of cl...

item.title: PNP to Study Feasibility of Electric Vehicles for Patrol Fleet Due to Rising Fuel Prices from Middle East Tensions
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) announced on Thursday, March 5, 2026, that it is seriously considering the adoption of electric vehicles (EVs) as part of its patrol car fleet. This comes in respo...

item.title: Senator Bong Go provides relief to fire-hit families in Mandaluyong
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — Senator Bong Go extended aid to families displaced by a recent fire in Barangay Addition Hills, Mandaluyong. The fire, which affected densely populated areas, left many families ...

item.title: Ashmolean Museum to Return 16th-Century Bronze Statue of Saint Tirumankai Alvar to Tamil Nadu
item.description: The Ashmolean Museum in Oxford is preparing to return a 500-year-old bronze statue of Saint Tirumankai Alvar, a South Indian Hindu saint, to Tamil Nadu, India. The 57.5cm tall statue was originally ho...
